rows.label: qev030103_MSG0001
rows.name:
I'm so glad my brother is safe,
zo... Because they looked ready
to kill us at any moment. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030103_MSG0002
rows.name:
If there are still kin who haven't
been saved yet, I think you should
proceed carefully, zo. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030103_MSG0003
rows.name:
I'm absolutely certain that brother
Oll is trying to pull off something
reckless to save me, da... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030103_MSG0004
rows.name:
That's the kind of brother he is, da...
Please, save him somehow before he gets
killed by those Cavern Clan guys... [ST:wait ]
